first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical, with the same score and the same core reasoning: the candidate is a strong software engineer but lacks specific experience in hardware architecture required for the role. The differences in the text are minor rephrasings and re-orderings of the same points, well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation. The model did not penalize or change its assessment based on the switch from plausible startup names to generic placeholder names.
